component.name: org.eclipse.sisu.plexus
component.description: Plexus-JSR330 adapter; adds Plexus support to the Sisu-Inject container

component.name: javax.annotation-api
component.description: Common Annotations for the JavaTM Platform API

component.name: cdi-api
component.description: APIs for CDI (Contexts and Dependency Injection for Java EE)

component.name: org.eclipse.sisu.inject
component.description: JSR330-based container; supports classpath scanning, auto-binding, and dynamic auto-wiring

component.name: plexus-component-annotations
component.description: Plexus Component "Java 5" Annotations, to describe plexus components properties in java sources with standard annotations instead of javadoc annotations.

component.name: plexus-utils
component.description: A collection of various utility classes to ease working with strings, files, command lines, XML and more.
